MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John W. Schilt, Esq., Law Office, 510-234-2808, for defendant and moving party
Gary Alabaster, Esq., from The Sapiro Law Firm, 415-771-0100, for plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WILSON CHAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS Denied. The motion is predicated on the sustaining of the demurrer to the first cause of action. One order signed for both motions. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John W. Schilt, Esq., Law Office, 510-234-2808, for defendant and moving party
Gary Alabaster, Esq., from The Sapiro Law Firm, 415-771-0100, for plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT WILSON CHAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Overruled as to the first and second causes of action and sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the fifth cause of action. The first and second causes of action are adequately pled. Plaintiffs are granted leave to amend to identify by name or code number the "State and Federal Securities Regulations". Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-28-2011 Continued To Jan-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GARY ALABASTER OF THE SAPIRO LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 771-0100 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. SABINA SADYKHOVA, TEL. NO. (510) 234-2802 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WILSON CHAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 9, 2012. The moving party to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B by December 30, 2011. Opposing party also to provide courtesy copies by December 30, 2011. Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: La Vena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(302/MJM)
